items.name: Blackstone RN-0 Recon Helmet
items.description:
The recon variant of the RN-0 Power Armor helmet. Comes with integrated infrared, UV and night vision for all kinds of special operations that require a scalpel rather than a hammer.

Comes with the baseline energy blade horns as well of course and looks cool.

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=RN-0&Category=1&CreatorName=Shameful%20Games&salesTypeFilter=1
